# Athlete Profile

## Personal Details
- Name: Anton
- Age: 42
- FTP: 251 W
- HR Max: 184 bpm
- Weight: 72.8 kg

## Goals
- Improve aerobic base through Q1 2026
- Target: Transcontinental Race No.12

## Training History
- 3 seasons of structured training
- Primary discipline: ultra-endurance road cycling
- Terrain: mixed flat/hilly, occasional mountain passes

## Equipment
- Road bike: 50/34 compact, 11-34 cassette
- Power meter: Wahoo Powrlink Zero
- HR monitor: Wahoo TICKR
